evals.prompt: Add a Tetris game to kloopik. Create games/tetris/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.
evals.expected_output: A working game.html using GameSDK (pre-roll ad, save/load highScore, interstitial on game over), and a complete games.json entry with all required fields.

evals.prompt: Implement a Flappy Bird clone for the kloopik portal. Create games/flappy/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.
evals.expected_output: A working game.html using requestAnimationFrame physics loop, GameSDK integration, and a complete games.json catalog entry.

evals.prompt: Add a Minesweeper game to the kloopik portal. Create games/minesweeper/game.html and add the catalog entry to src/_data/games.json.
evals.expected_output: A working game.html with click-based board interaction, mine flagging, win/loss detection, GameSDK save (highScore or best time), and a complete games.json entry.
